description: The Component Selector is better understood on its page, Complex Types in Components.

fields.ComponentSelected: The Sync delegate to call when the component is attached.
fields.ComponentFilter: The type of Components to show in the attacher.
fields.GenericArgumentPrefiller: A sync delegate that fills the list of generic arguments for a selected type so it doesn't only ask for a certain type.
fields._uiRoot: The root slot of the UI.
fields._rootPath: The path that this is navigated to in the component attacher.
fields._genericType: The generic type we are trying to make a generic fill for.
fields._customGenericTypeLabel: The label for the generic type we are attaching.
fields._customGenericTypeColor: The color for the generic type we are attaching.
fields._customGenericArguments: The generic arguments being used for the current Component being attached. See Complex Types in Components.

methods.OnCancelPressed: Closes the UI and doesn't attach anything.
methods.OnOpenCategoryPressed: Opens a category of the path argument given.
methods.OpenGenericTypesPressed: Handles loading the menu for selecting a generic argument screen for a component that has a generic argument like , , or to name a few.
methods.OpenGroupPressed: Handles bringing up the menu for opening a group of components of the same type (purple buttons).
methods.OnAddComponentPressed: Triggers when a component is addrd.
methods.OnCreateCustomType: Triggers when a component is made via the attacher with a generic type that isn't in the list of preselected generics.
